scripts.dev:collectionloom: cd packages/collectionloom && npm run tauri dev
scripts.dev:analysisloom: cd packages/analysisloom && npm run tauri dev
scripts.build:collectionloom: cd packages/collectionloom && npm run tauri build
scripts.build:analysisloom: cd packages/analysisloom && npm run tauri build
scripts.test:all: cd packages/core && cargo test && cd ../collectionloom/src-tauri && cargo test && cd ../../analysisloom/src-tauri && cargo test
